source.halfKellyDefaultNote: Pass --kelly for half-Kelly-style sizing (kellyFraction=0.5) or set --kelly-fraction.
source.tuningNote: Replay defaults: minEdgePp 6, maxTradesPerHour 7, cooldown 180s, best-first run order, per-strategy checkpoints; prob arb throttled; warm-from-log skips recompute for parsed rows.
